name: Glowing Jack-o-Lantern Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cover three cookie sheets with foil.
3. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and vanilla extract, mixing well.
5. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and salt. If the batter is too stiff, add milk a little at a time.
6. Divide the dough in half. Color all but 1/8 of it orange and the rest green.
7. Roll out small balls (about 2-inch) from the orange dough and flatten with your hand to form pumpkin shapes.
8. Place the pumpkins on the prepared cookie sheets.
9. Roll stems from the green dough and attach them to the top of each pumpkin.
10. Carefully cut out wide spaces for eyes, nose, and mouth using a knife.
11. Fill the holes with crushed lemon drops candy.
12. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until set, being careful not to brown. Allow cooling for 10 minutes before removing from foil.
